scripts.dev:services: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n redis,backend,frontend,events,docs -c red,green,blue,cyan,magenta "pnpm run dev:redis" "pnpm run dev -w packages/backend" "pnpm run dev --prefix frontend" "pnpm run start:events -w packages/backend" "pnpm run dev --prefix docs-site"
scripts.dev:redis: redis-cli ping 2>/dev/null | grep -q PONG && echo '[redis] Already running on :6379, reusing.' || redis-server
scripts.stop: lsof -ti :6379 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'packages/backend' 2>/dev/null; echo 'Vestra services stopped.'
